The keyboard is misbehaving!

Sometimes tUME goes into color setting mode by itself (as if you pressed
the numeric keypad), or acts as if the shift key is stuck down. If you
are observing these symptoms, try the following solutions:

1. Quick fix: If you are still in tUME, and the keys stop responding
(e.g., pressing b has no effect), press the left shift key, the right
shift key, the . (period) key on the numeric keypad, and turn off Num Lock.

2. Permanent fix: To configure your machine to make the problem go away,
install QEMM (instead of EMM386), and use the following QEMM options:
/IA (Ignore A20) and /U8 (Unusual 8042).

3. Use XMS instead of EMS.
